title: Omnisend vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Omnisend vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Omnisend and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. Omnisend is built for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Brands Wanting Email And Sms Together

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Omnisend wins for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: EmailOctopus starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
